commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Contributor revision plus after-fix real provider proof are needed; the missing external proof keeps this out of an automated repair lane.; Needs attention: The patch is security-sensitive and currently uses the wrong state signal for hidden reasoning suppression.; Review finding: [P1] Gate on resolved thinking state — src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts:2913 - [P1] Use request state in the direct provider... (sha=b0a2e9fd804aadc797bf5538b3a2846dffc64261)
commands.review_summary:
The PR gates OpenAI-compatible streamed reasoning deltas in the direct completions provider and transport stream parser based on `model.reasoning`.

PR surface: Source +8. Total +8 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: disabled thinking is represented by request/session options and provider wrappers while `model.reasoning` remains a capability flag. A reasoning-capable model with explicit thinking off can still append a leaked `reasoning_content` chunk through the patched transport parser.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor revision plus after-fix real provider proof are needed; the missing external proof keeps this out of an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(llm): prevent reasoning_content leak when reasoning is disabled
target.body:
### Type of Change - [x] Bugfix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) ### Issue / Problem Description When using reasoning: false with specific models, reasoning_content is still returned in streaming deltas. The previous generic parser bypassed the entire loop, which unintentionally broke the markStrict() security boundaries. ### Real Behavior Proof Below is the raw response snapshot showing the leaked CoT data under reasoning disabled settings: 

data: {"id":"chatcmpl-123","object":"chat.completion.chunk","choices":[{"delta":{"reasoning_content":"leaked_internal_thinking_text","content":null}}]}
### Fix Implementation Details - src/llm/providers/openai-completions.ts: Restored the main loop and markStrict() triggering logic to preserve the security boundary. Added gating logic exclusively inside appendThinkingDelta output. - src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts: Implemented parallel output gating control on the transport stream layer after verifying model.reasoning state context availability.
target.author: zz327455573
